name: io.github.developerz-ai/ui-debugger-mcp
description: Autonomous UI debugging MCP server: an agent drives the browser/desktop, reports bugs + UX issues.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the LLM provider (OpenRouter default)

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the LLM provider (defaults to OpenRouter)
